display_information.name: Crisis Companion
display_information.description: Ambient support for crisis-line volunteers: vetted de-escalation phrases, similar past cases, live resources.
display_information.long_description: Crisis Companion supports volunteer counselors on text-based crisis lines. When a volunteer debriefs a difficult session or asks for help mid-shift, the agent classifies the crisis type with a deterministic, vetted lexicon (no generative AI in the loop, zero hallucination by construction), surfaces similar past cases from the organisation's own anonymised debrief history via Slack's Real-time Search API, and fetches curated helplines and protocols through an MCP server. Every response carries a strict privacy pipeline: PII is scrubbed before any query leaves the thread, search is restricted to an allow-list of anonymised channels, and nothing is stored.

assistant_view.assistant_description: Real-time support for crisis-line volunteers: suggested phrasing, similar past cases, and vetted resources.
